title: erica aghillana var. aghillana
intro: Erica aghillana var. aghillana, also known as the Cornish Heath, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Erica aghillana var. aghillana include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in folk remedies and natural treatments.
